channel.title: Latest Updates
channel.description: The most recent blogs and online articles from The Economist

item.description: His more than 2,500 covers cleverly captured, mocked and ridiculed the world

item.description: Limestone villages and babbling brooks offer an escape from the modern world

item.description: The Roman empire shaped the religion in all sorts of crucial ways, a new book argues

item.description: Heatwaves are making access to AC a political problem around the world

item.description: Shantou was once at the forefront of reforms. Now it is a backwater

item.description: Electric vehicles should save both drivers and governments money

item.description: Climate change threatens your morning brew. Its future may depend on a long-lost plant

item.description: The platforms let their users bet on world events. But when outcomes are ambiguous, who gets to decide what happened?
